brand.name: Momentra
brand.description: Professional freelance videography with reels delivered within minutes.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, brand name

buttons.primary: bg-red-700 hover:bg-red-600 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide shadow-lg shadow-red-900/20
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm

cards.base: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-red-500/30 transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.pricing: flex flex-col h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-white/5 to-transparent border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:transform hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:border-red-500 transition-colors w-full
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2

navigation.bar: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings to achieve the cinematic look.
Ensure the background is always the deep red gradient pattern defined in 'theme.background'.
Do NOT use pure black background. Use the gradient.
Use 'lucide-react' for the camera icon above 'Mo' in Momentra.
Implement smooth scrolling and page transitions using framer-motion.
Forms must submit to the backend API which stores data in MongoDB.
Ensure the layout is fully responsive, stacking grids on mobile.
Add a subtle noise texture overlay if possible for film grain effect.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (success/error messages).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
anti_patterns: No purple or teal for CTAs (Use Red/White).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards.
